edition.title: The Psalms for Singing: A 21st Century Edition
2004 Irish Psalter

availability.licence: Copyright, Reformed Presbyterian Church of Ireland (reproduced with permission)

sourceDesc.p: Texts from the The Psalms for Singing, 2004.

application.label: Digital Splitleaf TEI Generator
application.desc: Transforms .txt input into a TEI file compatible with the Splitleaf interface.

projectDesc.p: This file is part of the Digital Splitleaf Digital Archive. Timothy Duguid
